panels.description: Sample-corrected total event count across all event names.

targets.query:
SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS total_events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS total_events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId)

panels.title: Total Events

panels.description: Distinct sandbox IDs (blob8) seen in the window. Excludes empty sandbox IDs (early HTTP events without context).

targets.query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob8) AS sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND blob8 != ''
targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob8) AS sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND blob8 != ''

panels.title: Distinct Sandboxes

panels.description: Fraction of events with a non-empty error string (blob5). Sample-corrected via _sample_interval. Yellow at 1%, red at 5%.

targets.query:
SELECT IF(SUM(_sample_interval) > 0, SUM(IF(blob5 != '', _sample_interval, 0)) / SUM(_sample_interval), 0) AS error_rate FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT IF(SUM(_sample_interval) > 0, SUM(IF(blob5 != '', _sample_interval, 0)) / SUM(_sample_interval), 0) AS error_rate FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId)

panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: Sample-weighted P95 of double1 (operation duration in ms) across events that report a non-zero duration.

targets.query:
SELECT quantileWeighted(0.95)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p95_duration_ms FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND double1 > 0
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT quantileWeighted(0.95)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p95_duration_ms FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND double1 > 0
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId)

panels.title: P95 Duration

panels.description: Per-second event rate (sum of _sample_interval / bucket size) by event name.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) * 1000 / $__interval_ms AS rps FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) * 1000 / $__interval_ms AS rps FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Event Throughput

panels.description: Event volume split by delivery layer (blob3): http, do, reconcile, queue.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob3 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob3 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Delivery Volume

panels.description: Reconcile actions emitted by the periodic reconciler (events matching reconcile.*). Spikes typically indicate a corrective sweep across many sandboxes.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND index1 LIKE 'reconcile.%' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND index1 LIKE 'reconcile.%' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Reconcile Actions

panels.description: Snapshot restore lifecycle (instance.restore_*). Watch for restore_failed / restore_retry_scheduled growth.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND index1 LIKE 'instance.restore_%' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND index1 LIKE 'instance.restore_%' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Restore Activity

panels.description: Top 20 event names by sample-corrected count.

targets.query:
SELECT blob1 AS event, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY event ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob1 AS event, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY event ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Events

panels.description: Top 20 event names that emitted with a non-empty error string.

targets.query:
SELECT blob1 AS event, SUM(_sample_interval) AS errors FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)

  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND blob5 != '' GROUP BY event ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob1 AS event, SUM(_sample_interval) AS errors FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)

  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND blob5 != '' GROUP BY event ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Erroring Events

panels.description: Recent region.capacity_eviction events. Spikes indicate Fly capacity pressure forcing evictions.

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob12 AS fly_region, blob13 AS action FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND index1 = 'region.capacity_eviction' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, blob12 AS fly_region, blob13 AS action FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND index1 = 'region.capacity_eviction' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Capacity Evictions

panels.description: Top error messages from blob5, sample-corrected. Surfaces dominant error classes that the per-event 'Top Erroring Events' table hides by aggregating only on event name.

targets.query:
SELECT blob5 AS error, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count, COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS distinct_events, COUNT(DISTINCT blob8) AS distinct_sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND blob5 != ''
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY error ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 25
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob5 AS error, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count, COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS distinct_events, COUNT(DISTINCT blob8) AS distinct_sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND blob5 != ''
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY error ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Error Messages

panels.description: 100 most recent events with a non-empty error string. Best entry point for triage.

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob5 AS error, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob12 AS fly_region FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND blob5 != '' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob5 AS error, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob12 AS fly_region FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND blob5 != '' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent Failures

panels.description: 100 most recent instance.* and reconcile.* events with status and label context.

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob9 AS status, blob6 AS fly_app_name, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob13 AS label FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND (index1 LIKE 'instance.%' OR index1 LIKE 'reconcile.%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob9 AS status, blob6 AS fly_app_name, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob13 AS label FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) AND (index1 LIKE 'instance.%' OR index1 LIKE 'reconcile.%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent Lifecycle Events

panels.description: Sample-corrected count of instance.stopped DO events with label trial_inactivity in the selected dashboard time range.

targets.query: SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS stops FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND index1 = 'instance.stopped' AND blob3 = 'do' AND blob13 = 'trial_inactivity'
targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS stops FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND index1 = 'instance.stopped' AND blob3 = 'do' AND blob13 = 'trial_inactivity'

panels.title: Trial Inactivity Stops

panels.description: Sample-corrected trial inactivity stops bucketed by Grafana's automatic interval in the selected dashboard time range.

targets.query: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, 'stops' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS stops FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND index1 = 'instance.stopped' AND blob3 = 'do' AND blob13 = 'trial_inactivity' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, 'stops' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS stops FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND index1 = 'instance.stopped' AND blob3 = 'do' AND blob13 = 'trial_inactivity' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Trial Stops by Interval

panels.description: Recent instance.stopped DO events with label trial_inactivity in the selected dashboard time range. double2 is machine uptime before stop. Limited to 100 rows.

targets.query: SELECT timestamp, blob2 AS user_id, blob15 AS instance_id, blob6 AS fly_app_name, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob9 AS status, blob13 AS stop_reason, double2 AS machine_uptime_ms FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND index1 = 'instance.stopped' AND blob3 = 'do' AND blob13 = 'trial_inactivity' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp, blob2 AS user_id, blob15 AS instance_id, blob6 AS fly_app_name, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob9 AS status, blob13 AS stop_reason, double2 AS machine_uptime_ms FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND index1 = 'instance.stopped' AND blob3 = 'do' AND blob13 = 'trial_inactivity' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent Trial Inactivity Stops

panels.description: Sample-weighted P50, P95, and P99 of double1 (operation duration) for events that report a non-zero duration.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, quantileWeighted(0.5)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p50, quantileWeighted(0.95)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p95, quantileWeighted(0.99)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p99 FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND double1 > 0
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, quantileWeighted(0.5)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p50, quantileWeighted(0.95)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p95, quantileWeighted(0.99)(double1, _sample_interval) AS p99 FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter AND double1 > 0
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 IN ($event),, $event)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob10 IN ($openclawVersion),, $openclawVersion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob11 IN ($imageTag),, $imageTag)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob14 = ${orgId:sqlstring},, $orgId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob15 = ${instanceId:sqlstring},, $instanceId) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
